---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in a skill, the installer, or the sample generators
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of what's broken.

## Where

- [ ] A specific skill (which one?): `<skill-name>`
- [ ] `scripts/install.py`
- [ ] Sample generators (`generate_sample_brief.py` / `generate_sample_deck.py`)
- [ ] CI workflow
- [ ] Docs (README / HOW-TO-USE / CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Reproduction

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Paste any error output, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Assistant: (Claude Code / GitHub Copilot / other)
- Python version (if relevant): `python --version`
- Commit SHA you're on: `git rev-parse --short HEAD`

## Additional context

Anything else that would help triage.
